name: Austin Mixed-Use Cross-Validation
purpose: Prove the benchmarking approach generalizes beyond Denver
success_criteria: Austin scores within 10 percentage points of Denver

project_input.additionalNotes: Ground floor 6000 SF retail, 29000 SF residential above (30 units), downtown location

known_austin_facts_for_sanity_check: Austin Land Development Code Section 25-2-492 covers site development
Austin uses SF-2, SF-3, SF-4, SF-5, SF-6 for single-family zones
Austin impervious cover varies by watershed: Barton Springs 15-25%, WSR 20-25%
Austin is in IECC Climate Zone 2A (hot-humid)
Austin maximum height in residential zones is 32 feet with 45-degree setback plane
